plugins.changelogTitle:
# Changelog

All notable changes to tekton-events-relay are documented here.
Format follows [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/).
Versioning follows [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

plugins.successComment:
🎉 This PR is included in version **${nextRelease.version}**.

Release: [${nextRelease.gitTag}](${releases[0].url})
plugins.failComment: ❌ Release failed. See [CI logs](${ciUrl}) for details.
plugins.releaseBodyTemplate:
<%= nextRelease.notes %>

---

## 📦 Installation

### Docker Image

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/fabioluciano/tekton-events-relay:<%= nextRelease.version %>
```

### Helm Chart (OCI)

```bash
helm install tekton-events-relay \
  oci://ghcr.io/fabioluciano/charts/tekton-events-relay \
  --version <%= nextRelease.version %>
```

### Quick Start

```bash
# With GitHub integration
helm install tekton-events-relay \
  oci://ghcr.io/fabioluciano/charts/tekton-events-relay \
  --version <%= nextRelease.version %> \
  --set config.github_token="$GITHUB_TOKEN" \
  --namespace tekton-events-relay \
  --create-namespace
```

See [Helm Installation Guide](https://github.com/fabioluciano/tekton-events-relay/blob/main/docs/helm-installation.md) for complete configuration.
